query:
SELECT email, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids, GROUP_CONCAT(companyName ORDER BY id SEPARATOR ' | ') as companies
FROM partner_candidates 
WHERE email != ''
GROUP BY email 
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 30;
